title: A Dream.
content:
I thought this heart enkindled lay
        On Cupid's burning shrine:
    I thought he stole thy heart away,
        And placed it near to mine.

    I saw thy heart begin to melt,
        Like ice before the sun;
    Till both a glow congenial felt,
        And mingled into one!
meaning: About: Thomas Moore was an Irish poet, singer, songwriter, and entertainer, now best remembered for the lyrics of "The Minstrel Boy" and the "The Last Rose of Summer".
